text.title: Win-Loss Interview Program Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Win-Loss Interview Program output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: named, NOT the rep who sold

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: sample_frame populated with a typed value
interviewer populated with a typed value
script populated with a typed value
timing_policy populated with a typed value
synthesis_distribution populated with a typed value
review_quarter populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
